name: Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lettuce and break it into pieces measuring about 2 to 3 inches.
2. Refrigerate for several hours.
3. Just before serving, sprinkle generously with grated Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper.
4. To make the dressing, combine lemon juice, wine vinegar, garlic olive oil, Worcestershire sauce, and coddled eggs in a bowl.
5. Beat until well blended.
6. Pour over the lettuce and toss to coat evenly.
7. Toss in croutons and serve. Serves 6.
Source: "Mountain Measures", Junior League of Charleston, WV. ed. 1974
